name: evidence-browser-cli
description: CLI tool for uploading bundles to Evidence Browser

scripts.test: npm -w @evidence-browser/shared run build && npm run build && node --test $(find test -type f -name '*.test.js' | sort)
scripts.prepack: npm run build && npm -w @evidence-browser/shared run build && rm -rf dist/vendor/shared && mkdir -p dist/vendor/shared skills/evidence-browser && cp -R ../shared/dist/. dist/vendor/shared/ && find dist/vendor/shared -name '*.test.*' -delete && cp ../../skills/evidence-browser/SKILL.md skills/evidence-browser/SKILL.md
